violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Observed seal on chest freezer in back was damaged.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of toaster ovens need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of toaster ovens need to be cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — ---Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.---Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.
